item.sophisticatedbackpacks.advanced_alc:
Automatically uses potions, food with effects, or milk buckets
Has additional effect filtering options
item.sophisticatedbackpacks.advanced_com:
Compacts items into their compressed variants
Both 2x2 and 3x3 recipes with more filtering options
item.sophisticatedbackpacks.advanced_dep:
Deposits items from backpack into sneak right clicked inventory
Has more filtering options
item.sophisticatedbackpacks.advanced_fee:
Feeds player with food from backpack's inventory
More options for when food gets fed to player
item.sophisticatedbackpacks.advanced_fil:
Filters items piped in and/or out of backpack
Has more filtering options
item.sophisticatedbackpacks.advanced_juk:
Portable Jukebox with support for more music discs
Also more playback options
item.sophisticatedbackpacks.advanced_mag:
Magnets items into backpack at a greater range
Has more filtering options
item.sophisticatedbackpacks.advanced_pic:
Makes backpack pickup items
Has more filtering options
item.sophisticatedbackpacks.advanced_pum:
Pumps Fluids between Tank upgrade and adjacent blocks
Works with fluid containers in hand and fluid blocks in world
Allows to filter which fluids are pumped
item.sophisticatedbackpacks.advanced_ref:
Keeps refilling stack of selected items in player's inventory
Allows for more precise target slot selection
Also allows middle click picking blocks from backpack
item.sophisticatedbackpacks.advanced_res:
Restocks backpack from sneak right clicked inventory
Has more filtering options
item.sophisticatedbackpacks.advanced_too:
Automatically swaps item in player's hand for the one effective on the block/entity when these are left clicked.
Has filter options and enables swapping wrench like tools for block/entity player is looking at with %s
item.sophisticatedbackpacks.advanced_voi:
Voids items selected in filter
Has more filtering options
item.sophisticatedbackpacks.alchemy_upgr: Automatically uses potions, food with effects, or milk buckets
